issues.detail: Does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.
Uses curl|bash to install infrastructure agent without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: NRQL slowest endpoints for payment-service
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces a reasonable NRQL with FACET and SINCE but omits max/count enrichment and explicit ORDER BY; treatment exactly mirrors the SKILL.md pattern with average/max/count plus ORDER BY average(duration) DESC LIMIT 20.

scenarios.name: NerdGraph alert policy + NRQL static condition
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to suggest deprecated REST v2 alert endpoints rather than NerdGraph, missing alertsPolicyCreate/alertsNrqlConditionStaticCreate mutations, signal aggregation, and terms; treatment uses the exact mutations and headers from the SKILL.md.
